description_long: This is a modern, rectangular two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, minimalist design. The front features a double garage with two red cars, a main entry door, and large windows that allow natural light into the living spaces. The interior layout includes a staircase, multiple rooms, and open-plan living areas, with visible furnishings such as beds, sofas, and plants. The exterior walls are predominantly white, with brown accents on doors and window frames. The house is constructed primarily from concrete or masonry, with glass windows and wooden interior elements. The overall aesthetic is functional and contemporary, suitable for an urban neighborhood.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, double garage, large windows, and a clean white exterior accented by brown doors and frames.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double garage with two red cars, main entry door, large windows, and visible staircase inside.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the house, interior room divisions, and partial visibility of the staircase and furnishings.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the back rooms, additional windows, and a more private aspect of the house layout.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage from the back, interior spaces, and the arrangement of rooms and furniture.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows on the front and sides
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a single solid door, no porch, and direct access from the driveway; minimal decorative elements.
